comment: Expansion #4 Step-2 fan-out, shape B (dict->list[str], some entries with ?caliber= layered-nav queries). Transcribed verbatim from scraper_gunbuyer.py inline CALIBER_URLS on 2026-06-14, parity-proven byte-identical before flip. Magento storefront behind a Cloudflare wall that 403s the layered-nav (?caliber=) URLs after 1-2 hits per session, so the scraper opens a FRESH browser context per pagination page. Handgun calibers have clean per-caliber subcat .html pages; the rifle parent doesn't subdivide, so rifle calibers drive the layered-nav ?caliber=N facet IDs (verified 2026-05-02 vs the live filter sidebar). Combo facets (e.g. 223/5.56) and the pure-NATO facet are separate entries because Gunbuyer indexes some SKUs on only one; seen_ids dedups overlap. The facet id is stored in `query`, apart from `path`, so the redirect guard ignores it. Per-entry `source` records which facet id maps to which upstream caliber label. Not yet harness-validated; validation null until Step-3. Approved by Jon, Step-2 fan-out, 2026-06-14.
